chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5492 of 2022 CPs D 5493, 5494, 5761 & 7870 of 2022 CP D 1750 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.23474/2022. 2. For hearing of CMA No.23500/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Shahrukh Farogh Naseem, advocate for the petitioners. Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the petitioner. Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the respondent. Barrister Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil alongwith Syed Kumail Abbas and Zaheer Ahmed, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, pursuant to the Income Tax (Amendment) Ordinance, 2024, these petitions have served the purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. However, petitioners remain at liberty to agitate any fresh cause, subject to the law. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
